summary: An unresolved git merge conflict marker (`<<<<<<< sonic-moe`) in `transformers/modeling_utils.py` at line 1974 causes a Python SyntaxError when the doc builder imports the transformers module during documentation build.
root_cause: Unresolved git merge conflict marker (`<<<<<<< sonic-moe`) in transformers/modeling_utils.py at line 1974 triggers Python SyntaxError: invalid syntax

evidence.quote:
File "/home/runner/work/transformers/transformers/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/transformers/modeling_utils.py", line 1974
    <<<<<<< sonic-moe
    ^
SyntaxError: invalid syntax
evidence.reason: Explicit syntax error showing the unresolved merge conflict marker `<<<<<<< sonic-moe` at line 1974 in modeling_utils.py, which is invalid Python syntax.

evidence.quote:
SyntaxError: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.
invalid syntax
evidence.reason: The doc builder's error message indicates a syntax error was encountered when the doc builder tried to import transformers, confirming the merge conflict breaks the module import.

evidence.quote:
File "/home/runner/work/transformers/transformers/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/doc_builder/autodoc.py", line 40, in find_object_in_package
    submodule = getattr(module, split, None)
evidence.reason: The traceback shows the error occurred during module attribute access in the doc builder, which triggered the import of the corrupted transformers module.

suggested_fix: Resolve the merge conflict in transformers/modeling_utils.py at line 1974 by removing the conflict markers (`<<<<<<<`, `=======`, `>>>>>>>`) and keeping the correct code version, then commit the fix to the branch.
